name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bf272cd8655e1ed4adeb5360c7de8cd9d12b2acf004b965a9902e0c448ab991f2939fc09ae4bc67a4227e90955200dad0ccfaa65790f7f7a
Senate Confirms Mike Pompeo as Trump’s Next Secretary of State

- The Washington Post

On Thursday, the Senate confirmed Mike Pompeo as America’s 70th Secretary of State. In a statement, President Donald J. Trump called Pompeo—who has served as Director of the CIA since last year—a “patriot” who has “immense talent, energy, and intellect.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bf272cd8655e1ed4f6d1d1a3e1bb1ad2161fca27eb705e2db92edc1afde041d6132736ecef3ab0f6f7d96d3a43dd6e5ce475f92446e38a83

Trump Tells Border Officials to Block Migrant Caravans from Entering US

- Washington Examiner

President Trump directed the Department of Homeland Security this week to “block large groups of migrants who have begun to arrive at the U.S.-Mexico border and apply for asylum as refugees from Central America,” Anna Giaritelli reports.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bf272cd8655e1ed4ba77c6ee5087eaf5c0b315764bcc11561c19710079e467807550123e7acd82c87405f9b05675d27535985e397785af3f

Trump Hosts Full State Visit for French President Macron

- CNBC

The first official state visit of the Trump Administration took place earlier this week at the White House. President Trump sat down with French President Emmanuel Macron over the course of several days to discuss trade, security, and a range of other bilateral issues.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bf272cd8655e1ed42d5805f2c395cab725cdb5c178439621b7015f5dc020e52d9b174daa084a3b5a0df8bb60b739f58aa9d87e99d6cd5e5a

Melania Trump Masters the Moment

- CNN

“When President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump arrived on the White House South Lawn Tuesday morning to formally welcome French President Emmanuel Macron and his wife, Brigitte, one thing was clear,” Betsy Klein and Kate Bennett write. “The first lady commanded attention.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bf272cd8655e1ed474fec8f78984bac9ad32aa7cc31b562df320ade2e3ffa96c5c833d82f7dfa14337207f320c9ed83eb717165c1b71c953

Apple’s Tim Cook Meets with Trump in Oval Office

- Bloomberg

Apple CEO Tim Cook met with President Trump in the Oval Office on Wednesday. “Looking forward to my meeting with Tim Cook of Apple,” the President tweeted before the two men sat down. “We will be talking about many things, including how the U.S. has been treated unfairly for many years, by many countries, on trade.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=bf272cd8655e1ed4ba86b4abffd6ce5dd99b360edcf7f43f5dac4733a0d2badb417b1cdabf1c1dd501a9435c884538d7a838dd7c84585bec

Trump Greets Wounded Warrior Project Soldier Riders at White House

- CBS News

For the second year in a row, President Trump welcomed participants from the Wounded Warrior Project’s Soldier Ride to the White House on Thursday. The Soldier Ride brings together wounded veterans and service members for a four-day adaptive cycling program.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ff95538d31cfb3baaabf495edb05ffcd663abbc7a5c57c021fac9648deaf4496dc835d62eb808b3d6f8f9c75479f4b35893d6813bdafe179

body:
There's a lot that's confusing about our politics right now -- but there are two things I'm sure about, Derek:
---
There's a lot that's confusing about our politics right now -- but there are two things I'm sure about, Derek:
1. Donald Trump and his Republican Party pose a fundamental threat to the future of our democracy.
2. The only way to truly stop them is to take back Congress in November.

Republicans also know that we have a real chance to stop them in their tracks at the ballot box this November -- that's why they are going to keep spending huge amounts of money to hang on to their majorities.

But I also know that all the money in the world can't beat out a strong organizing program -- we've proven that in some special elections that were never supposed to be competitive.

**You haven't donated yet this year -- and I can't tell you how much it would mean if you made your first donation of 2018 before Monday's deadline. Your $3 donation will help Democrats win nationwide.**

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Who we're fighting for
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30cb/9e00690/44bacb8c/24026d00/2160629881/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180428_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180428_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG")
Friends --

Like so many Floridians, my family struggled to make ends meet. We grew up on food assistance and I went to the free dental clinic whenever the time came. My parents weren't college educated, but they both worked hard: my mother as a bus driver and my father as a construction worker.

I grew up rich in opportunities though. I had parents, a grandmother, and teachers who encouraged and taught me the importance of hard work and a good education. And quite honestly, if it weren't for them and the people who truly believed I could succeed, I wouldn't be who I am today.

To me, this race has never been about what we're fighting against -- it's about who we're fighting for, and what kind of state we want to live in. And I think every Floridan deserves the same opportunities I had to break the cycle of intergenerational poverty.

**[We can make these new opportunities a reality for every Floridian, but it's going to take all of us working together. So can I count on you to chip in $5 before our end-of-month deadline to help me keep fighting?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30cb/9e00690/44bacb8c/24026d03/2160629881/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-april-eom?gpsid=13_55_102&refcode=em18_180428_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180428_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+We+can+make+these+new+opportunities+a+re")**

As Governor, I will work to create jobs that pay a living wage on every rung of the income ladder and make sure every child has access to a high-quality public education. If we are going to rebuild our state into one that works for all of us, we have to get there together -- and that's why I launched my campaign last year.

I knew then, and I still know now, that our only path to victory is one we're willing to travel together.

**[So please, chip in $5 now and help us meet our goal before Monday.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30cb/9e00690/44bacb8c/24026d02/2160629881/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-april-eom?gpsid=13_55_102&refcode=em18_180428_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180428_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+So+please+chip+in++ask++now+and+help+us+")**

Bring it home,

Andrew

clean_body: "" Friends -- Like so many Floridians, my family struggled to make ends meet. We grew up on food assistance and I went to the free dental clinic whenever the time came. My parents weren't college educated, but they both worked hard: my mother as a bus driver and my father as a construction worker. I grew up rich in opportunities though. I had parents, a grandmother, and teachers who encouraged and taught me the importance of hard work and a good education. And quite honestly, if it weren't for them and the people who truly believed I could succeed, I wouldn't be who I am today. To me, this race has never been about what we're fighting against -- it's about who we're fighting for, and what kind of state we want to live in. And I think every Floridan deserves the same opportunities I had to break the cycle of intergenerational poverty. "" As Governor, I will work to create jobs that pay a living wage on every rung of the income ladder and make sure every child has access to a high-quality public education. If we are going to rebuild our state into one that works for all of us, we have to get there together -- and that's why I launched my campaign last year. I knew then, and I still know now, that our only path to victory is one we're willing to travel together. "+" Bring it home, Andrew "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 1550 Melvin Street, Tallahassee, FL 32303

| | Hey Peter,

I just got this email from Peter. He's nervous because after the primary, the money that our opponents are spending attacking each other will all be aimed squarely at Joe -- and with a millionaire self-funder in the mix and possibly pulling ahead, we're going to need our campaign to be firing on all cylinders.

This end-of-April deadline is nearly the LAST CHANCE to show your support before the other side picks their candidate! We need to bring 1,000 more donors on board before midnight on Monday to stay on track.

**[Can we count on you to help us level the playing field before the deadline?>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20dc/7377f838/3eba7d8e/51f95381/3325827957/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-aprileom2018?refcode=20180428.1nd&amount=10")**

He only raised $95k this quarter -- but he donated another $2mil to himself again. He's now brought his self funding to $5.45 million total for the primary.
>

>

> Peter

subject: Another ratings upgrade for the 7th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

April may not have felt much like spring, but our campaign to flip the 7th has taken root and is growing fast.

More and more people are hearing our message. In April, our campaign was endorsed by End Citizens United and NARAL, adding to the number of endorsements from people who know we can win. Our 1,115 campaign volunteers are out knocking doors and phone banking.

And our message continues to make an impact on the electoral landscape, as well. This week, Larry J. Sabato's Crystal Ball updated its rating of the 7th District from "Likely Republican" to "Leans Republican!" This is the 4th ratings upgrade and is yet another encouraging sign that we're running a powerful and competitive campaign -- and it's a reminder that we still have a lot of ground to cover.

We need your support to back our volunteers up and give them everything they need to cover the map. It takes resources to print literature, pay for mail, and get our message out. To win, we need to introduce Team Spanberger to everyone in this District. With your help, we can take the word to all corners of the 7th.

We've done so much together, and I'm thankful for everyone who has pitched in. name: Ben Jealous
subject: Investing in our cities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friend,
From Salisbury and Baltimore to Cumberland, our cities have experienced chronic underinvestment in education, transportation, and job creation. The uprisings following the killing of Freddie Gray revealed the depth of this chronic disinvestment and three years later we still have yet to answer this crisis of opportunity with policy change.
As governor, I will invest in our cities to ensure equal opportunity for all and return them to the economic hubs they once were.
This episode represents everything currently wrong with our politics, and the manner with which career politicians conduct themselves when they feel their power threatened.
**[My plan will make Maryland safer, help alleviate the barriers keeping so many Marylanders from opportunity and drive investments in our cities to create real economic growth.
